dataset.grain: week × product category × region × dominant payment channel
assumptions: First category observation falls back to current price, producing zero proxy discount; scenario output remains an assumption, not a causal estimate.

product_names: Moveis Cozinha Area De Servico Jantar E Jardim
provenances: Olist observed order/item/freight + dominant payment channel; prior-only reference-price with first-observed-category-week current-price fallback (zero proxy discount), review/status return, and 60% COGS proxies
